title: Austin, Texas
summary: A pilgrim in Austin, Texas. Overcast sky, thirty degrees, four kilometers along a lake. They had a story to tell. About an idea that started as three words at a brainstorming event, became an app, and then became this. No one asked them to build it. They just did. That is already more than most people managed today.
